description_long: This desk features a striking live-edge wood tabletop with a natural, organic pattern that combines light and dark wood tones, accented by reddish-brown edges. The surface appears to be finished with a clear, glossy coating that highlights the intricate grain and color variations. The desk is supported by two robust, rectangular black metal legs, each forming a U-shape with a double-bar base for stability. The overall design is modern and artistic, blending rustic wood aesthetics with industrial metal elements. The desk has a substantial, solid appearance, with no visible drawers or storage compartments. Its clean lines and unique wood slab make it a statement piece suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A modern desk with a live-edge wood slab top featuring natural grain patterns and sturdy black metal U-shaped legs. The glossy finish and bold design make it a standout piece for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the live-edge wood top and both black metal U-shaped legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wood slab and the depth of the black metal leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge of the wood top and the open space between the two metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the natural wood grain and the double-bar base of the metal leg.
attribute_location: modern office, creative studio, or upscale urban apartment
attribute_orientation: The long side with the most visually accessible wood grain and unobstructed leg space is intended to face the user, with the black metal legs positioned at each end for support.
attribute_usage_context: executive writing desk or creative workspace
